challenges.title: Responsive Nav Bar
challenges.description: Create a horizontal navigation bar that transforms into a vertical stacked menu on screens narrower than 600px.
hints: Use a media query for max-width: 600px
Change flex-direction from row to column
Ensure touch targets are at least 44px tall

challenges.title: Nav with Dropdown Submenu
challenges.description: Extend a horizontal navigation bar to include a dropdown submenu that appears on hover.
hints: Nest a <ul> inside a <li> for the submenu
Position the submenu absolutely below the parent
Show it on :hover of the parent <li>

challenges.title: Hamburger Menu
challenges.description: Create a mobile navigation with a hamburger icon that toggles the menu visibility using a checkbox hack.
hints: Use a hidden checkbox input to track state
Use a <label> styled as the hamburger icon
Use the :checked selector to show/hide the menu
